briefs.title: Insurance Council Must Now Provide Continuing Education for Agents and Adjusters — Restricted Agents Excluded
briefs.summary: BC amended the Insurance Council Regulation to require the Insurance Council to deliver continuing education programs for general and life insurance agents, salespersons, and adjusters — explicitly excluding restricted insurance agent licensees and their staff.
briefs.action_required: If you hold an insurance licence, confirm whether your licence category requires continuing education under the updated Insurance Council program.
